headline: Clear calendar day — use it to drive the 'no ground truth' evals design doc forward before the next bi-weekly TR cycle.

flags: Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are both broken — you have zero visibility into customer escalations and product metrics. Fix before EOD.
AE-1079 has no due date set; risk of it drifting. Consider setting a target date (e.g., draft by 3/27, review by 4/1 TR).
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in the Big Rock TR — monitor whether any evals work touches Autopilot quality and be ready to speak to it.
March telemetry data was noted as needing an update in the TR appendix — once Snowflake is fixed, pull March numbers for low-code vs coded agents.
slack_summary: Clear calendar day — best use is pushing the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079) toward a reviewable draft before the next bi-weekly TR. Top urgent items: (1) fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake integrations so you're not blind to escalations and metrics, and (2) async-ping Dragos/Tomasz to validate the reference-free eval approach before you commit it to the doc. Zero meetings today — protect the focus time.
